zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterinde是Richard Doterinde的女兒，於1302年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾。她於1323年與Henry de Trafford在英國藍卡爾特拉福德 曼諾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在她的家鄉享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterinde was born in 1302, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Richard Doterinde. She married Henry de Trafford in 1323, in Trafford Manor, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1360, in her hometown, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterinde est née en 1302, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Richard Doterinde. Elle a épousé Henry de Trafford en 1323, à Trafford Manor, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterindeは1302年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーでRichard Doterindeの娘として生まれた。1323年にイギリスランカシュアイアトラフォード マノーでHenry de Traffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年に故郷で58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterinde(은)는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 Richard Doterinde의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 랭카실르 트래퍼드 먼어에서 Henry de Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Doterinde родилась в 1302 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Richard Doterinde. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Trafford в 1323 г. в местности траффорд манор, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет.
